name: City-County Employees
description_short: City-County Employees Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative in Clearwater, FL offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to credit union members.
description_long:
City-County Employees Credit Union (CCECU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union based in Clearwater, Florida. The organization operates under NCUA insurance and maintains a routing number (263177712) for standard banking operations. CCECU serves its members by positioning itself as a financial institution dedicated to improving members' financial positions through quality products and competitive rates.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of deposit and lending products. On the deposit side, members can access share accounts, share draft (checking), money market accounts, club accounts, and certificates of deposit. For borrowing, CCECU provides auto loans (including marine and motorcycle financing), personal loans, home equity loans, first mortgages, watercraft loans, and VISA credit cards. Additional services include online banking, mobile banking, bill pay, Zelle transfers, debit cards, and shared branching access.

CCECU distinguishes itself through several specific features: a dedicated vehicle finder tool for members shopping for autos, boats, RVs, motorcycles, and powersports; exclusive TruStage life insurance offerings for members; credit monitoring through Credit Sense; and loan protection products including guaranteed asset protection and mechanical repair coverage. The credit union emphasizes member education through financial literacy resources and maintains 24-hour telephone banking access.

As a credit union, CCECU operates on a not-for-profit model returning value to member-owners rather than external shareholders. However, the website provides limited transparency regarding membership eligibility requirements, specific rate competitiveness data, or detailed fee structures beyond referencing a fee schedule document. The organization appears to serve a general membership base from the Clearwater area rather than exclusively serving employees of a specific city or county entity despite its name.
services: Auto loans with Autolink and Auto Advisors
Home equity loans and lines of credit
First mortgages and OnePlus mortgage products
VISA credit cards (Platinum and Secured options)
Debit cards with Round Up feature
Loan protection (guaranteed asset protection, mechanical repair coverage, debt protection)
pros: 24-hour telephone banking access (727-447-1076) for member convenience
Comprehensive vehicle financing options including autos, boats, motorcycles, RVs, golf carts, and powersports through integrated Find a Vehicle tool
Exclusive TruStage life insurance plans available to credit union members with competitive rates
Credit Sense access allowing members to monitor credit reports and scores with alerts
Loan protection products including guaranteed asset protection and mechanical repair coverage
Shared branching network access expanding physical banking convenience
Skip-a-Payment and Message Pay loan management options for member flexibility
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility criteria or whether organization is open to general public membership
Limited transparency on competitive rate positioning—no specific APR or comparison data provided on website
Physical location limited to single Clearwater, FL branch (1810 N Belcher Rd) with no indication of additional locations despite shared branching partnership
best_for: Members seeking comprehensive auto and vehicle financing with integrated shopping tools
Credit union members in the Clearwater, Florida area wanting local financial services
Individuals interested in bundled financial products (checking, savings, loans, credit cards) under a member-owned cooperative structure
diagnosis: CCECU is best for credit union members in the Clearwater area seeking a full-service financial institution with competitive lending products, particularly those interested in vehicle financing and member-owned cooperative benefits. Primary caveat: membership eligibility requirements are not clearly stated on the website, and the organization's actual service area and eligibility beyond the stated name are unclear.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: City-County Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in CLEARWATER, FL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
